title: centaurea sulphurea
intro: Centaurea sulphurea, also known as Yellow Star-thistle, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Centaurea sulphurea include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Centaurea sulphurea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to suit individual needs.
